name: §6Tiger
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Strength: §c15
§7Crit Chance: §95%
§7Crit Damage: §950%
§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]

§6Merciless Swipe
§7Gain §c+30% ⫽ Ferocity§7.

§6Hemorrhage
§7Melee attacks reduce healing by §655%

§6Apex Predator
§7Deal §c+100% §7damage against targets with
§7no other mobs within §a15 §7blocks.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Snow Tiger Ocelot Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aOcelot§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
